compiled_state.title: As a developer, all references to DESIGN_NOTES.md point to .claude/design-notes.md
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Description

**What**: Update all references to DESIGN_NOTES.md across the codebase to point to .claude/design-notes.md, including config schema defaults
**Why**: The design notes file is moving to .claude/ to co-locate with project-understanding.md; stale references will cause detection failures and wrong defaults for new projects
**Scope**:
- IN: All 23+ files referencing DESIGN_NOTES.md; workflow-config-schema.json design_notes_path default; validate-config.sh acceptance of new path; any config validators
- OUT: Creating the new .claude/design-notes.md file (S5); updating script consumers that reference skill names rather than file paths (S9)

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, all files that reference DESIGN_NOTES.md are updated to .claude/design-notes.md
  ← Satisfies: "all existing references to DESIGN_NOTES.md across the codebase are updated"
- When this story is complete, no references to the old DESIGN_NOTES.md path remain in the codebase (verified via grep)
  ← Satisfies: "all existing references to DESIGN_NOTES.md across the codebase are updated"
- When this story is complete, workflow-config-schema.json design_notes_path default and examples are updated to .claude/design-notes.md, and validate-config.sh accepts the new path
  ← Satisfies: "all existing references to DESIGN_NOTES.md across the codebase are updated"
- When this story is complete, unit tests written and passing for all new or modified logic

## Considerations

- [Maintainability] 23+ files is high blast radius — use a systematic grep-and-replace approach with verification pass after

## Escalation Policy

**Escalation policy**: Proceed unless a significant assumption is required to continue — one that could send the implementation in the wrong direction. Escalate only when genuinely blocked without a reasonable inference. Document all assumptions made without escalating.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: All implementation tasks closed. Story complete: all DESIGN_NOTES.md references migrated to .claude/design-notes.md across 21 files.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
